name: Bullpen
notes: Bullpen Capital, post-seed VC fund. HQ at 215 2nd Street, San Francisco, CA. Some older sources reference Menlo Park but current address is SF.

name: Canaan Partners
notes: Founded 1987; historically HQ'd in Stamford CT, now primarily based in Menlo Park CA (2765 Sand Hill Road). Multiple sources confirm Menlo Park as current primary HQ.

name: Cartograph Ventures
notes: Seed-stage fund founded 2021 by Alexander Cantwell, focused on consumer brands, consumer health, and consumer tech.

name: Chicago Ventures
notes: Early-stage VC firm founded 2011, HQ at 222 W. Merchandise Mart Plaza, Suite 1212, Chicago, IL.

name: Clerisy
notes: Growth equity firm founded 2020 by Lisa Myers and Alexandra Wilkis Wilson; focused on consumer and techsumer; HQ Miami, FL.

name: Coefficient Capital
notes: Consumer-focused early-stage VC; HQ at 27 Union Sq W, New York, NY. Launched 2019 with $170M fund.

name: CoFound Partners
notes: Inception-stage VC firm founded 2019 by Jordan Wan; focused on B2B SaaS, healthcare, and enterprise. Based in New York.

name: Colter Ventures
notes: Founded 2018 by Sam McBride (ex-RXBAR COO); seed/Series A/B fund focused on consumer brands and consumer tech. HQ Aspen, CO.

name: Commerce Ventures
notes: Early-stage VC focused on commerce and fintech; HQ at 555 Mission Street Suite 3250, San Francisco, CA.

name: Coreline Ventures
notes: Founded 2025; invests in US and Japan companies in B2B software, vertical AI, fintech, and consumer. HQ Redwood City, CA with offices in SF and Tokyo.

name: Courtside Ventures
notes: Founded 2015 by Vasu Kulkarni; focused on sports, media, and gaming tech; HQ at 148 W 24th St, New York, NY. $200M+ AUM.

name: Craft Ventures
notes: Founded 2017; early-stage and growth VC based in San Francisco, CA.
